events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: From the Cavern to global superstardom, Ringo Starr's iconic drumming defined a generation. Join us in celebrating his 86th birthday.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the rock legend and astrophysicist, Brian May! His guitar work with Queen remains truly out of this world.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: 83 years young and still commanding the stage! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched in the US
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched in the United States with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star?
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV burst onto our screens, changing music forever. Did video really kill the radio star? We'll let you be the judge.

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: A quarter-century ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music. Remembering the iconic Woodstock Festival.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: His voice, his moves, his legacy. Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on from his passing. The King lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who passed away in 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: A voice that defined a generation. Remembering the enduring impact of Tupac Shakur, 30 years after his tragic passing.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Still inspiring guitarists worldwide. Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix, 56 years after we lost a true original.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Crossing The Road
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those tracks... pure timeless genius.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the inimitable Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and songwriting continue to rock.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and solo artist Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still bringing that unmistakable swagger to the world of rock and roll.

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine'
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic anthem 'Imagine' was released on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 49 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A timeless message that resonates just as powerfully today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: A Thousand Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember when this changed everything? The first iPod arrived 25 years ago, putting a thousand songs in your pocket.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! What's your favourite Bond film, agent? And who's your pick for the next 007?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of legendary Beatles co-founder John Lennon.

angles.name: Remembering John
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the unparalleled talent and enduring legacy of John Lennon.
